name: Smoke and Mirrors
text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Choose a unit you control and another unit you control at a different location. If at least one of them has [Temporary], move each to the other's location. Draw 1.
